cross_vertical_goal: extract reusable patterns for document ingestion pipelines, LLM preprocessing, and RAG workflows without assuming the Microsoft OSS ecosystem as the target
current_project_scope: map to active projects (BrainStorming, SupportAI, THOR) only when overlap is real
future_project_scope: preserve usefulness for future unknown document ingestion projects
mode_rationale: No active related topics (prior markitdown runs archived to _tmp as stale); security_review_required is true due to document parser file-processing surface

phase_6_5.weakened_to_noted_reason: user elected NOTED treatment at Phase 6.5 budget checkpoint ($13.21 of $15.00 cap); both findings are wording refinements to already-present caveats, not new recommendation directions — passed to Publisher for direct incorporation

cost_estimate_usd.note: Sonnet agents (R+I+GF+Analyzer+Critic×2+SecRev×2+Tester+Challenger+Publisher) 905555 × $0.000008 = $7.24; Writer (Opus, 2 passes) 177186 × $0.000039 = $6.91. Total = $14.15. Excludes Director session; run /cost for full total.
